---
title: "Gene expression project"
subtitle: "Analysis script"
author: "Bernice Sepers & Ane Liv Berthelsen"

format:
  html: 
  #pdf: 
    papersize: "a4paper"
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"
    number-sections: FALSE
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - inner=3cm
      - outer=3cm
      - top=2cm
      - bottom=3cm
      - headsep=22pt
      - headheight=11pt
      - footskip=33pt
      - ignorehead
      - ignorefoot
      - heightrounded
    fig-pos: 'h'
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    tbl-cap-location: top
editor: visual
date: 11/20/2023
mainfont: Times New Roman
---

```{r}
#install.packages("here")
#library(here)
here::here()
```
